CustomField.description: Grouping key for log flood control. Detail rows store detail:<key> (at most one per fingerprint, enforced by uniqueness); daily rollup rows store rollup:<key>:<yyyyMMdd>. Blank on ungrouped entries. The framework reserves the bypass: key prefix for bypass-audit fingerprints.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Log-grouping key. Filter detail: rows for forensics and rollup: rows for volume counts. Blank for entries logged without a fingerprint.
CustomField.label: Fingerprint
